title: Musical Statues

sections.heading: WHAT YOU'LL NEED TO PLAY
sections.middleText1:
two switches
record:
"freeze!" on one switch 
"dance!" on the other

sections.heading: HOW TO PLAY
sections.body:
1. Play some music and start dancing.
2. When the switch user presses "freeze!", pause the music and everyone stops.
3. Restart the music and dance again when the switch user presses "dance!"

tooltipText: Use 2 switches to play a game of musical statues, controlling when the music starts and stops
